name: che-word-mcp
description: Word MCP Server - Swift 原生 OOXML 操作，171+ 個工具。v3.2.0+ insert_equation 完整 LaTeX 子集；v3.3.0+ preserve-by-default round-trip fidelity；v3.4.0+ comment-thread/people/notes/web-settings；v3.5.0+ true byte-preservation via dirty tracking — Reader-loaded NTPU 論文 no-op save 後完整保留 13 fontTable + 6 distinct headers + 4 footers + three-segment PAGE field + <w15:presenceInfo> identity。Closes #23 round-2 + #32 #33 #34。
